Imagine falling in love with someone your family says you can never be with. Imagine hiding that love for five years, lying to everyone you care about, feeling your body break down from the stress of secrets. Maya was seventeen when she met Alex. Her family had strict rules: never date someone from a different culture. But Alex was different, and everything about him felt right. This is the story of choosing love over family expectations, of hiding and fear, and of finding your voice when the world says no.
